notes: All three factual claims in the source content are confirmed by multiple independent tier-1 sources: (1) MetLife Stadium in East Rutherford, New Jersey is the venue for the final — confirmed by Wikipedia, MetLife Stadium's official site, and FIFA.com. (2) The final date is Sunday, July 19, 2026 — confirmed by Wikipedia and MetLife Stadium's official event page. (3) The tournament features 48 teams for the first time, co-hosted by USA, Canada, and Mexico — confirmed by Wikipedia and FIFA.com. No conflicts found across sources. Media note: the claim involves no proprietary broadcast footage; any visuals of the stadium should be recreated with Nano Banana unless a press-release/official photo is cleared.
